data.title: Meteora proposes to distribute 3% of TGE reserves to Jupiter stakers in the form of liquidity position NFTs
data.description: SolanaFloor announced on the X platform that Meteora, the Solana ecosystem liquidity protocol, has unveiled a new proposal following backlash over its JUP staker distribution plan. 3% of the Meteora (Meteora Asset Management) TGE reserve will be distributed to Jupiter stakers in the form of liquidity position NFTs on a time-weighted basis, providing them with Meteora/USDC liquidity exposure upon the token's launch.

data.description:

data.title: Galaxy Digital's associated address withdrew another 13 million ASTER tokens, worth $29.12 million
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address associated with Galaxy Digital withdrew another 13 million ASTER tokens, valued at $29.12 million. The total ASTER held by this address has increased to 46 million, valued at $103 million. The tokens accumulated over the past 24 hours now account for 2.77% of the circulating supply.

data.title: NMHI, a US-listed company that launched an XRP treasury plan, raised $2 million through a rights issue.
data.description: Nature's Miracle (NMHI), a US-listed company that has launched an XRP treasury program, announced it has signed a $2 million convertible preferred stock investment agreement with an Asian private investment firm. The company has received an initial $500,000 in funding, with a further $1.5 million expected to be paid by November 15, 2025. The company, which previously dabbled in Bitcoin mining, announced a $20 million enterprise XRP treasury program in July of this year. The company will use the proceeds from the equity financing to purchase XRP and meet working capital needs. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Bernstein maintains its "outperform" rating on publicly listed Bitcoin mining company IREN
data.description: IREN, a US-listed Bitcoin mining company, has recently shown strong momentum, rising more than 500% over the past six months, surpassing MARA to become the largest publicly listed Bitcoin mining company by market capitalization. Bernstein has now maintained its "outperform" rating on the company and more than tripled its target price to $75 per share. IREN's stock price has risen more than 305% so far this year, and as its artificial intelligence business matures and expands from the proof-of-concept stage to longer-term contracts, they expect its price-to-earnings ratio to further expand. (The Block)

data.title: Could Ripple (XRP) Hit New All-Time Highs? Wave 3 Setup Suggests So
data.description:
Wave 3 setup emerges as XRP's consolidation ends, which could launch the asset toward new all-time highs.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/could-ripple-xrp-hit-new-all-time-highs-wave-3-setup-suggests-so/

data.title: Scilex Holding and Biconomy Sign MOU to Develop Cryptocurrency Strategy and Asset Management Solutions
data.description: Scilex Holding Company, a publicly listed US company specializing in non-opioid pain management products, announced the signing of a non-binding, non-exclusive memorandum of understanding with Biconomy to collaborate on cryptocurrency and asset management strategies. The partnership encompasses three key areas: utilizing Biconomy's cryptocurrency trading platform to provide Scilex with global digital asset trading services for major cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin and Ethereum, with a potential value exceeding $1 billion per cryptocurrency; establishing a cryptocurrency asset management strategy for Scilex that balances security, liquidity, compliance, and profitability; and providing Scilex with financial and trading information through Biconomy.com's technology to monetize digital assets. (GLOBE NEWSWIRE)

data.title: Thumzup Media Corporation, a company affiliated with Trump's son, approves $10 million share buyback plan
data.description: Thumzup Media Corporation, a social media company invested in by Donald Trump Jr. and holding cryptocurrency reserves, announced that its board of directors has approved a $10 million share repurchase program. As of September 19, 212,432 shares of common stock had been repurchased at a weighted average price of $4.71 per share, for a total of approximately $1 million. Additionally, Thumzup Media Corporation disclosed that it currently holds 19,106 Bitcoins and approximately 7.5 million Dogecoins. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Coinbase to List Stablecoins Backed by Local Currencies in Australia and Singapore
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong announced in a post on the X platform that Coinbase will list stablecoins backed by the local currencies of Australia and Singapore: AUDD and XSGD. The launch time is reportedly 7:00 PM (UTC) on September 29th.

data.title: Aave v3 will launch on X Layer, the Ethereum Layer 2 network incubated by OKX, in the coming weeks.
data.description: According to an announcement Wednesday, Aave v3 will launch “in the coming weeks” on X Layer, an Ethereum Layer 2 network developed by crypto exchange OKX. (The Block)

data.title: Data: The number of MERL tokens staked on the chain has reached 232 million, accounting for 23.7% of the circulating supply
data.description: According to Lookonchain, the amount of MERL staked on-chain continues to rise, reaching a total of 232 million MERL (worth $71.5 million, or 23.7% of the circulating supply). Currently, only 91.84 million MERL (worth $28.3 million) remains on centralized exchanges.

data.title: Flare Network launches XRP-wrapped token FXRP
data.description: Flare Network announced the launch of FXRP, an XRP-wrapped token that supports decentralized finance (DeFi) applications. It is reported that XRP holders can deposit collateral through Flare's "independent agent" network to mint FXRP, enabling the asset to be traded, borrowed, or provided as liquidity on Flare-based platforms. (The Block)

data.title: Galaxy Digital-associated addresses withdrew 9 million ASTER tokens from Gate, valued at $20.7 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, Galaxy Digital's associated address withdrew 9 million ASTER tokens from Gate, valued at $20.7 million. Currently, the total holdings are 33 million $ASTER tokens, valued at $75.9 million.

data.title: The US government may be facing its first shutdown since the winter of 2018-19.
data.description: Traders are cautiously awaiting Thursday's initial jobless claims data and Friday's PCE inflation data, while also closely watching for thorny developments that could trigger a US government shutdown. US President Trump canceled key talks with Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and House Minority Leader Steve Jeffries, which had been expected to avert a government shutdown before the September 30 deadline. Deutsche Bank analyst Jim Reid wrote in a note to clients Wednesday morning: "The cancellation of the meeting has sparked renewed concerns that funds could run out by next week's deadline and we could see the first government shutdown since the winter of 2018-19." (Jinshi)

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 4,200 USDT with a 0.57% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Sep 24, 2025, 14:52 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 4,200 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 4,201.959961 USDT, with a narrowed 0.57% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: SUI Group disclosed that it holds over 105 million SUI tokens, with a holding value of nearly US$360 million.
data.description: SUI Group, a Nasdaq-listed SUI treasury company, disclosed holdings of 105,630,660 SUI tokens as of September 23rd, valued at approximately $359 million at a price of $3.40. The company also announced it had repurchased 276,296 shares of its common stock for approximately $1.2 million. (Businesswire)

data.title: GSR Submits New Applications for DATETF and Crypto Strikemax ETF
data.description: Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas posted on the X platform that GSR's new applications for the DAT ETF and the "Crypto Strikemax ETF" were advised by Tuttle.

data.title: ETF Offers Advantages Over Crypto Tokens, Analyst Says
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Bloomberg senior ETF analyst Eric Balchunas shared on social media that ETFs possess all the benefits of crypto tokens, including instant access, low costs, flexibility, and the ability to generate returns through lending. Additionally, ETFs offer extra advantages not found in crypto tokens, such as regulatory protection, anonymity, and a 24/7 customer service hotline.

data.title: Hong Kong Monetary Authority: Currently no offshore RMB stablecoin is issued in Hong Kong
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) has issued a warning on its official account regarding recent social media reports that the world's first stablecoin pegged to the offshore RMB has been issued in Hong Kong. Please note that this information is false. The Stablecoins Ordinance will come into effect on August 1, 2025. Anyone who issues a fiat stablecoin in the course of their business in Hong Kong, or actively promotes such an issuance to the Hong Kong public, will need to obtain a stablecoin issuer license from the HKMA. Currently, the HKMA has not issued any stablecoin issuer licenses. Therefore, anyone who issues or promotes a stablecoin is breaking the law. If you are approached by someone promoting a stablecoin, please remain vigilant. The HKMA will monitor stablecoin transactions in the market and, if any suspected violations of the Stablecoins Ordinance are identified, will consider taking further action based on the relevant facts and evidence.
